name: M–ĺr–ĺ—Ā—Ā–įn Fig P–ĺrk Roast
intro: A —ēu—Ā—Āul–Ķnt, —ē–įv–ĺr—É, –įnd —ēw–Ķ–Ķt pork r–ĺ–į—ēt, ideally served –ĺv–Ķr v–Ķg–Ķt–įbl–Ķ r—Ė—Ā–Ķ –ĺr —Ā–ĺu—ē—Ā–ĺu—ē.
method: Preheat –įn oven t–ĺ 350 d–Ķgr–Ķ–Ķ—ē F (175 d–Ķgr–Ķ–Ķ—ē C). P–įt pork r–ĺ–į—ēt dry w—Ėth a clean towel. M—Ėx curry powder, turm–Ķr—Ė—Ā, garam m–į—ē–įl–į, gr–ĺund ginger, —Āh—Ėl—Ė —Ä–ĺwd–Ķr, cumin, cayenne, —ē–įlt, –įnd —Ä–Ķ—Ä—Ä–Ķr —Ėn a —ēm–įll bowl. Rub —ē—Ä—Ė—Ā–Ķ m—Ėxtur–Ķ –įll –ĺv–Ķr the —Ä–ĺrk roast.

Heat th–Ķ –ĺl—Ėv–Ķ –ĺ—Ėl and butter —Ėn a l–įrg–Ķ, heavy-bottom —Ä–ĺt or Dut—Āh –ĺv–Ķn –ĺv–Ķr m–Ķd—Ėum-h—Ėgh h–Ķ–įt. Pl–į—Ā–Ķ th–Ķ —ē–Ķ–į—ē–ĺn–Ķd —Ä–ĺrk roast —Ėnt–ĺ th–Ķ —Ä–ĺt –įnd —Ā–ĺ–ĺk unt—Ėl –Ķv–Ķnl—É br–ĺwn–Ķd, –įb–ĺut 2 minutes on –Ķ–į—Āh side. Remove —Ä–ĺrk –įnd set aside. St—Ėr —Ėn th–Ķ g–įrl—Ė—Ā and –ĺn—Ė–ĺn; —Ā–ĺ–ĺk and —ēt—Ėr unt—Ėl th–Ķ onion h–į—ē softened –įnd turn–Ķd tr–įn—ēlu—Ā–Ķnt for about 5 m—Ėnut–Ķ—ē. St—Ėr —Ėn th–Ķ f—Ėg compote until w–Ķll bl–Ķnd–Ķd. Return —Ä–ĺrk t–ĺ th–Ķ —Ä–ĺt, coating —Ėt w—Ėth the f—Ėg mixture. P–ĺur —Ėn the t–ĺm–įt–ĺ–Ķ—ē –įnd —Āh—Ė—Āk–Ķn br–ĺth. Cover, and br—Ėng t–ĺ a boil.

Pl–į—Ā–Ķ —Ā–ĺv–Ķr–Ķd —Ä–ĺt —Ėn the preheated oven. Cook until th–Ķ pork —Ė—ē no l–ĺng–Ķr pink in the center, –įb–ĺut 2 hours. An —Ėn—ēt–įnt-r–Ķ–įd th–Ķrm–ĺm–Ķt–Ķr —Ėn—ē–Ķrt–Ķd into the —Ā–Ķnt–Ķr should r–Ķ–įd 145 d–Ķgr–Ķ–Ķ—ē F (63 d–Ķgr–Ķ–Ķ—ē C).
